2026-03-13FINBank of Canada ActOrder appointing the firm of accountants BDO Canada LLP of Ottawa, Ontario to perform the annual audits of the Bank of Canada Order appointing the firm of accountants BDO Canada LLP of Ottawa, Ontario, to be the auditor the Bank of Canada for the five fiscal years commencing on January 1, 2026 and terminating December 31, 2030.N/A
subject: Order appointing the firm of accountants BDO Canada LLP of Ottawa, Ontario to perform the annual audits of the Bank of Canada
precis: Order appointing the firm of accountants BDO Canada LLP of Ottawa, Ontario, to be the auditor the Bank of Canada for the five fiscal years commencing on January 1, 2026 and terminating December 31, 2030.
